title: glaucium corniculatum var. flavum
intro: Glaucium corniculatum var. flavum is a variety of the yellow hornpoppy plant, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, due to the presence of alkaloids like glaucine and berberine. The health benefits of Glaucium corniculatum var. flavum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, and to act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
